positive: A minimalist, stylized illustration of a celestial forest scene. The central subject is a cluster of interconnected, glowing bioluminescent flora and fauna (mushrooms, ethereal vines, and stylized fox silhouettes) rooted on a single, dark obsidian-like forest floor. The composition must be perfectly centered and framed for apparel printing. Utilize deep indigo and cosmic purple tones for the background gradient, contrasted sharply by vibrant neon cyan, electric lime, and warm gold for the glowing elements. The style should blend Japanese woodblock print aesthetics with modern vaporwave bioluminescence, featuring thick, clean lines and high contrast silhouettes. Cinematic, high detail, perfect symmetry, ready for screen printing.
negative: blurry, artifact, text, watermark, logo, trademark, messy, bad anatomy, extra limbs, noise, cartoonish, grainy, photographic, cluttered, low contrast
